summary: Comprehensive testing of AI Virtual Dressing Room with Gemini Nano Banana integration. Frontend functionality working perfectly. Critical backend issue: Emergent LLM key budget exceeded preventing AI image generation.

critical_bugs.issue: Emergent LLM key budget exceeded (Current: $16.30, Max: $16.22)
critical_bugs.impact: Blocks AI image generation - core functionality of dressing room
Some character images cannot be processed

passed_tests: Health endpoint returns 'Gemini Nano Banana' as image engine
Character selection and preview in dressing room
Part toggles (Upper, Lower, Shoes, Jacket, Dress, Accessories) working
Apply Outfit button UI flow and processing notification
Settings page with all 6 setting toggles functioning
Navigation between Dressing Room, Settings, Character Manager, Outfit Library
Quick settings switches (Precision mode working, Face lock has minor overlay issue)
Refresh button and more options dropdown
CRUD operations for characters and outfits (10/11 backend API tests passed)
Sample data seeding when database empty
Responsive design and clean UI layout
action_item_for_main_agent: URGENT: Emergent LLM key has exceeded budget limit ($16.30/$16.22). This is blocking core AI image generation functionality. Need to either increase budget limit or provide new API key to restore Gemini Nano Banana functionality.
success_percentage: Backend: 91% (10/11 APIs work, image generation blocked by budget), Frontend: 95% (minor overlay issue on one switch)
